---
title: "traintestsplit"
output: html_document
---

# import data

```{r}

hoteldata <- readRDS("hoteldata_og.rds")
hotel_dummy <- readRDS("dummy_no_normalization.rds")

```


# original structure

```{r}

set.seed(12345)
ratio <- 0.5

train_rows_og <- sample(1:nrow(hoteldata), ratio*nrow(hoteldata))

train_og <- hoteldata[train_rows_og, ]
test_og <- hoteldata[-train_rows_og, ]

str(train_og)
str(test_og)


saveRDS(train_og, file = "train_og.rds")
saveRDS(test_og, file = "test_og.rds")
```

# dummy coding train test split 

```{r}

set.seed(12345)
ratio <- 0.5

train_rows_dummy <- sample(1:nrow(hotel_dummy), ratio*nrow(hotel_dummy))

train_dummy <- hotel_dummy[train_rows_dummy, ]
test_dummy <- hotel_dummy[-train_rows_dummy, ]

str(train_dummy)
str(test_dummy)

anyNA(train_dummy)
anyNA(test_dummy)

saveRDS(train_dummy, file = "train_dummy.rds")
saveRDS(test_dummy, file = "test_dummy.rds")
```
